# Agent Setup Index

This folder contains workspace-level customization for AI-assisted development.

## Structure
- `AGENTS.md`: default multi-agent behavior and repo-wide priorities.
- `copilot-instructions.md`: always-on coding guidance for this workspace.
- `instructions/`: numbered instruction files (`##-Name.instructions.md`).
- `agents/`: specialized sub-agent definitions for large tasks.
- `prompts/`: reusable prompt templates for recurring workflows.

## Numbering Convention
- `00-*`: highest-priority bootstrap and foundational context.
- `01-09`: durable project constraints and architecture.
- `10+`: optional advanced guidance.

Populate `instructions/00-Bootstrap.instructions.md` first.
